title: BEM-758 execute route
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/handoff','governance/tasks/pending','governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 18:51 (UTC+3)'
def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists(): return {}
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'))
    except: return {}
route=load('governance/state/bem757_route_after_bem756_verification.json')
route_status=route.get('status','unknown')
# Execute the current route. If Claude runtime remains unavailable, create a no-operator diagnostic response draft that explains blocker, not a fake Claude approval.
if route_status=='route_process_claude_response':
    status='processing_claude_response_next'
    action='handoff remains pointed at real Claude response processing'
    blocker=None
elif route_status=='route_repair_lint_gate_again':
    status='lint_repair_required_next'
    action='next task must repair remaining workflow lint violations'
    blocker={'code':'LINT_GATE_REPAIR_REQUIRED'}
elif route_status=='route_diagnose_claude_action_outcome':
    status='claude_action_outcome_diagnosis_required'
    action='next task must inspect Claude runtime outcome state'
    blocker={'code':'CLAUDE_ACTION_OUTCOME_DIAGNOSIS_REQUIRED'}
else:
    status='direct_fallback_recorded_no_fake_claude'
    action='recorded blocker response draft and continue repair of real Claude runtime'
    blocker={'code':'REAL_CLAUDE_RUNTIME_NOT_PROVEN','message':'Do not claim Claude answered. Fallback records the blocker and keeps real runtime repair active.'}
    fb=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem758_runtime_blocker_no_fake_claude.md')
    fb.write_text('# BEM-758 | RUNTIME BLOCKER REPORT | NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Decision: BLOCKED'+sep+'Why no previous response: repository evidence still does not prove Claude runtime start/completion. The issue is transport/runtime wake-up, not architecture content.'+sep+'Runtime/trigger status: dispatcher repaired, lint fix applied, but real Claude runtime response not present.'+sep+'Blocking reason: REAL_CLAUDE_RUNTIME_NOT_PROVEN.'+sep+'Required fix: continue dispatcher/runtime evidence repair or run an explicit Claude workflow_dispatch through a channel that produces state.'+sep+'Final recommendation: do not treat this as Claude audit result; continue real Claude runtime repair.'+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-758 ROUTE EXECUTED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Route: '+route_status+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Action: '+action+sep+'Operator relay: forbidden.'+sep)
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem758_continue_real_claude_runtime_repair.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-758 Pending | Continue Real Claude Runtime Repair'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Route: '+route_status+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Action: '+action+sep)
state={'schema_version':'execute_bem757_route.v1','bem':'BEM-758','status':status,'route_status':route_status,'action':action,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem758_execute_bem757_route.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem758_execute_bem757_route.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-758 | Execute BEM-757 Route | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Route: '+route_status+sep+'Action: '+action+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem758_execute_bem757_route','status':status,'route_status':route_status,'action':action,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem758_execute_bem757_route.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-758 '+status+' route='+route_status+'\n')
changed=[str(handoff),str(pending),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)]
if status=='direct_fallback_recorded_no_fake_claude':
    changed.append('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem758_runtime_blocker_no_fake_claude.md')
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-757 route; if real Claude runtime is not proven, recorded a BLOCKED runtime report without pretending Claude approved')
"""
No issue comments.
